chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5624 OF 2019 Muhammad Bashir Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.24871/19 2. For haring of main case. Dated: 05.05.2025 None for the petitioner. Ms. Zehra Sehar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019 which is over six years old. It was last taken up on 03.09.2019, which is over six years ago. In these six years period learned counsel for the petitioner has made no efforts to diligently pursue this petition. Today none is present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is over six years old. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
